faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a yellow jacket nest in Millburn?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Millburn. Our technicians can typically eliminate yellow jacket nests within 1-2 hours of arrival, with most treatments completed in a single visit. faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 yellow jacket removal service include?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a complete property inspection, professional-grade treatment of the nest, removal when accessible, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. Pricing varies based on nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground nests and easily accessible areas are typically at the lower end, while wall voids or high locations may require additional equipment.

faqs.question: Are yellow jackets common in Millburn neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, Millburn's mature landscaping, wooded areas, and proximity to South Mountain Reservation make it prime territory for yellow jackets. They commonly nest in ground burrows, shrubs, under eaves, and within wall voids of homes. Activity peaks from July through October when colonies are largest and most aggressive.

faqs.question: Is yellow jacket removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted treatment methods that eliminate yellow jackets while minimizing exposure to people and pets. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols and will advise you on any necessary precautions during treatment. We recommend keeping children and pets indoors during the service, and you can typically resume normal outdoor activities within a few hours.
